title: Unique Party 55764 - 34" Giant Gold Foil Number 4 Balloon
features: Large Number Balloon measures 34" (86cm) when fully inflated with air or helium (ships uninflated)
Ideal for a 4th birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for a milestone birthday party or anniversary party
Combine with latex balloons and curling ribbon to create a balloon bouquet or table decoration
Coordinate with other gold birthday decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Giant Classic Gold 34" Foil Number Balloons Make no mistake where the celebrations begin with these Giant Classic Gold Foil Number Balloons! These balloons are ideal to show off your birthday age, anniversary year or new year in eye catching fashion and fit any party with a gold motif or accent! Don't forget the balloon weights and ribbon!
